title: CHUANGSEED 3-Pack White Masking Tape General Purpose Beige Painters Tape 48mm x 55m for Basic Painting, Home, Office, School Stationery, Arts, Crafts and Decoration(White)
features: General Purpose Masking Tape : White 48mm x 54m 3 Rolls - Bulk,Premium Adhesion: Natural rubber pressure sensitive adhesive w/ easy tear-off & residue free removal.

Clean and Sharp Paint Lines - Masking Tape will help you create a perfect edge in all types of painting, trimming, edging, masking and protective applications. Great balance of strength, flexibility, durability, and removability. Contains crepe paper backing to prevent paint bleed, yet removes cleanly without damage. You’ll always get a perfect edge when you use it to create a border for painting or caulking jobs.

Labeling White Painters Tape : Chuangseed masking tape can be written upon. You can quickly mark or label anything with clear text. It’s ideal for labeling, party decorations, home storage, designing, crafting and so on.

Easy to tear and remove-good holding power to help resist lifting or curling, special backsize treatment provides easy to use controlled unwind. General Purpose Masking Tape for Home and Office, Good for crafts, making labels, fixing lightweight items, painting.

Tearable Wide Masking Tape : Made of crepe paper, it provides conformability for easy application, easily hand tearable and resists slivering. Special backsize treatment provides easy to use controlled unwind.
